topArticles.title: Critical vulnerability affects popular JavaScript build tools
topArticles.summary: A newly disclosed vulnerability affects build pipelines used by modern JavaScript applications.
topArticles.whyItMatters: It may affect CI/CD security and dependency trust in frontend projects.
topArticles.recommendedAction: Review affected packages and update lockfiles.

topArticles.title: Angular introduces improved developer experience for standalone apps
topArticles.summary: Angular continues improving standalone workflows and modern application defaults.
topArticles.whyItMatters: It affects how new Angular projects should be structured.
topArticles.recommendedAction: Review the new recommendations and compare them with current project conventions.

topArticles.title: AI coding tools add stronger repository-aware suggestions
topArticles.summary: AI coding assistants are improving context awareness across larger repositories.
topArticles.whyItMatters: Better repository context can improve productivity in real projects.
topArticles.recommendedAction: Test repository-aware workflows in a small side project.

topArticles.title: Spring ecosystem improves observability defaults
topArticles.summary: Spring projects continue improving observability and production diagnostics.
topArticles.whyItMatters: Observability is essential for backend services and microservices.
topArticles.recommendedAction: Review logging, metrics and tracing configuration in Spring Boot projects.

topArticles.title: GitHub Actions adds new workflow security recommendations
topArticles.summary: GitHub publishes updated guidance for safer CI/CD workflows.
topArticles.whyItMatters: CI/CD pipelines are a common attack surface.
topArticles.recommendedAction: Audit workflow permissions and third-party actions.

topArticles.title: PostgreSQL performance tips for growing applications
topArticles.summary: A practical overview of indexing and query planning improvements for PostgreSQL apps.
topArticles.whyItMatters: Database performance often becomes a bottleneck as projects grow.
topArticles.recommendedAction: Review indexes and slow queries in development databases.
